scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend,mobile -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm --prefix godam-mobile run start"
scripts.dev:pg: bash -lc 'export DB_TYPE=postgres DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://godam_user:godam_dev_local@127.0.0.1:5432/godam_db}"; npm run pg:up --workspace backend 2>/dev/null || true; npm run pg:bootstrap --workspace backend 2>/dev/null || true; npm run dev'
scripts.dev:web: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:web:huawei: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "env HUAWEI_GODAM_STREAMLIT_AUTOSTART=1 npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
